calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-07-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mary O'Keefe for and with Kenneth Dunckel

Ms. O'Keefe stated she talked to the lawyer who prepared the Will, who was specific in adding the language regarding no relatives; decedent was an only child, his parents are both deceased, his mother was an only child, his father's sister had no children and died in December 1976. Ms. O'Keefe also stated that Mr. Dunckel has looked at all the documents in the house and found no records of any relatives. The Court granted the petition for probate of will and for letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order).

**Status on close of estate is set for January 8, 2020.**

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-27-2018 Continued To Oct-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
